overall.description: First-person walkthrough of a rainy neon-lit cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring futuristic architecture, digital billboards, outdoor seating areas, and pedestrians with umbrellas. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing cinematic lighting with dominant cyan and magenta neon reflections on wet surfaces.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered pedestrian walkway with wet wooden decking. The camera moves forward toward a brightly lit plaza entrance, following a pedestrian with an umbrella. Neon signs from distant buildings illuminate the end of the corridor, reflecting off the rain-slicked floor.

futuristic circular bench structure with integrated purple and cyan neon lighting
rain-slicked stone tile surface reflecting ambient neon light

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide plaza with large trees growing from illuminated circular planters. Rain falls visibly in the open air. The camera curves slightly right, passing a futuristic circular seating structure with neon lighting, while the wooden deck transitions to wet stone paving.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along an elevated walkway with glass railings, overlooking the lower plaza level where people sit at outdoor tables. Large trees remain visible to the left while the path curves gently toward a commercial building entrance ahead. The wet tiles reflect the surrounding neon lighting.

passing under warm yellow umbrellas with purple neon accents

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor restaurant seating with yellow umbrellas and neon accents

segments.scene_description: Moving under the shelter of a building overhang, the camera passes an outdoor dining area with distinctive yellow umbrellas lit by purple neon. Digital advertisement screens cover the building wall to the right. The area is protected from the rain, and several people are seated at the dining tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level plaza with luxury seating and bar area

slowing approach as reaching the curved outdoor seating destination

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area, the camera enters an open plaza with distinctive pink-foliage trees and approaches a luxury curved seating area. A person with red hair sits on the gold-trimmed couch under a canopy. The area features an outdoor bar structure in the background, and rain continues to fall in the neon-lit environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered pedestrian corridor into a sprawling, neon-drenched cyberpunk plaza. It begins within a covered walkway of wet wooden decking, moving forward toward a brightly lit entrance where distant neon signs reflect off the rain-slicked floor. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene opens into a wide plaza of wet stone paving and illuminated planters, curving past a futuristic circular seating structure while rain falls visibly in the open air. The path then shifts onto an elevated walkway with glass railings that overlooks lower dining levels before turning under a building overhang, where purple neon lights illuminate yellow umbrellas and digital advertisement screens. Finally, the camera emerges back into the open rain, passing pink-foliage trees to approach a luxury gold-trimmed seating area and an outdoor bar under the glow of the city's cyan and magenta lights.
